title: Add Persistent Floating Music Player and Settings Page with Background Music

requirements.summary: Create a persistent floating music player component that plays YouTube tracks via YouTube IFrame API, supports track navigation, volume control, on/off toggle, auto-loop, and persists state in sessionStorage
acceptanceCriteria: Floating player is visible and accessible on every page of the app
Player is fixed to the bottom-right corner and does not obstruct main content
Right arrow advances to the next track; left arrow goes to the previous track
Track wraps from last to first and first to last when cycling
On/Off toggle starts and stops playback
Volume slider ranges from 0 (muted) to 100 (full volume)
Left and right nudge buttons adjust volume by 5 units per click
Track auto-loops when it reaches the end
Current track name is displayed in the player UI
Player state (track index, volume, on/off) is restored from sessionStorage after navigating between pages

file_operations.description: Create a React component that embeds a hidden YouTube IFrame player using the YouTube IFrame API. The component manages an array of 8 Sonic tracks (Angel Island Zone Act 1, Angel Island Zone Act 2, Chemical Plant Zone, Green Hill Zone, Emerald Hill Zone, Ice Cap Zone, Flying Battery Zone, Hydrocity Zone), each mapped to a real YouTube video ID. Render UI controls: left/right arrow buttons for previous/next track (with wrapping), an On/Off toggle button, a volume slider (0-100), and left/right nudge buttons that adjust volume by 5 units. Display the current track name. Implement auto-loop on track end. Use sessionStorage to persist and restore current track index, volume level, and on/off state across navigation. Apply fixed positioning to the bottom-right corner with appropriate z-index and styling that does not obstruct critical UI elements.

Create a custom React hook that encapsulates the YouTube IFrame API integration and music player state management. Export functions to initialize the YouTube player, load tracks by video ID, control playback (play/pause), navigate tracks (next/previous with wrapping), adjust volume, and sync state with sessionStorage. Return the current track index, track name, volume, isPlaying state, and control functions. This hook will be consumed by both FloatingMusicPlayer and SettingsPage to ensure shared state.

requirements.summary: Mount the FloatingMusicPlayer component in the root App layout so it renders persistently on all pages
acceptanceCriteria: FloatingMusicPlayer is rendered on every route including HomePage, AdminPanel, ModeratorDashboard, UserStatus, and any Settings page
Player does not unmount or reset when the user navigates between pages

file_operations.description: Import FloatingMusicPlayer and render it as a persistent component within the RouterProvider structure, outside the route-specific content so it remains mounted across all route changes. Place it after the Toaster component to ensure it is always visible on every page.

requirements.summary: Create a new Settings page with a Background Music section that lists all tracks, allows track selection, supports importing YouTube URLs to add custom tracks, and mirrors the floating player's volume and on/off state
acceptanceCriteria: Settings page is linked from the main navigation and accessible to all authenticated users
Background Music section lists all 8 Sonic tracks with individual Select buttons
Currently active track is visually highlighted
Selecting a track from the list switches the floating player to that track
YouTube URL input field accepts a pasted URL; clicking 'Add Track' appends the track to the rotation
Invalid or empty URL submissions show an inline error message
Volume slider and on/off toggle on the Settings page reflect and update the floating player state
Changes made on the Settings page are immediately reflected in the floating player

file_operations.description: Create a new Settings page component that renders a 'Background Music' section. List all 8 Sonic tracks from the rotation with a 'Select' button for each track. Highlight the currently active track visually. Provide an input field for pasting YouTube URLs and an 'Add Track' button that parses the URL for the video ID and appends it to the track rotation in sessionStorage. Display an error message for invalid or empty URLs. Include a volume slider (0-100) and an on/off toggle that consume and update the shared useMusicPlayer hook state. Ensure all changes immediately reflect in the FloatingMusicPlayer via shared sessionStorage state.

requirements.summary: Add a 'Settings' navigation link in the main app header/navbar visible to all authenticated users
acceptanceCriteria: A 'Settings' link appears in the main navigation for all authenticated users
Clicking the link navigates to the Settings page
The Settings link is not shown to unauthenticated users

file_operations.description: Add a 'Settings' navigation link in the header navigation bar. Use the existing isAuthenticated state from useInternetIdentity to conditionally render the link only for authenticated users. The link should navigate to the /settings route.

requirements.summary: Register the Settings page route in the TanStack Router configuration at /settings, wrapped in an AuthGuard
acceptanceCriteria: Navigating to /settings renders the SettingsPage component
Unauthenticated users are redirected away from /settings by the AuthGuard
The route is included in the TanStack Router tree

file_operations.description: Import SettingsPage and register a new route at path '/settings' in the TanStack Router configuration. Wrap the SettingsPage component with the existing AuthGuard to ensure only authenticated users can access it. Add the route to the router tree alongside existing routes like '/admin', '/moderator', and '/user'.
